title: Reports
subtitle: Generate and manage your analytics reports
errorLoad: Failed to load reports. Please try again.
emptyState: No reports yet. Generate your first one to get started.
emptyDescription: Generate your first report to get insights into your AI visibility, competitive positioning, and content performance.
deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the report and its shared links. This action cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Generate Report
dialog.description: Select a project and report type to generate an analytics report from your latest pipeline data.

share.title: Share Report
share.empty: This report does not have a public link yet.
share.copyError: Could not copy the share link.

shared.unavailableDescription: The link may be invalid or expired.

detail.unknownShape: This report payload could not be rendered.
detail.noContent: No published content was included in this report.

sections.engineBreakdownHint: Average scoring across tracked engines included in this report.
sections.topGapsHint: The weakest dimensions in the latest visibility scoring.
sections.competitorsHint: How competitors appeared across the analyzed answers.
sections.competitorAnalysisHint: Mention counts, sentiment, and average position for tracked competitors.
sections.positioningHint: Mention-rate view of competitors across the analyzed answer set.
sections.contentInventoryHint: Published assets included in the content performance report.
